scenes.narration: Your terminal just got a serious upgrade. Meet Gemini CLI from Google.

visual.title: Gemini CLI
visual.subtitle: Google's AI agent in your terminal

scenes.narration: It is fully open source. A real AI agent that runs in your terminal.

visual.support: a free AI agent built into your command line

scenes.narration: Gemini's models do the thinking. The CLI reads and writes your files. It runs shell commands for you. And it searches the live web.
First, it reasons about your goal. Then it acts with a tool. It observes what changed. And repeats until the job is done.
A chatbot only gives you answers. Gemini CLI takes real action. It edits files and runs commands itself.
And it is free to start. Just sign in with your Google account.

visual.support: 1000 requests a day with a Google account

scenes.narration: Ready to code faster? Try Gemini CLI today. Follow for more.
